title: Financial Gift Letter
description: Declaration confirming that transferred cash is a financial gift, not a loan, often required for home mortgage loans.
whatsCovered: Total gift cash value and date of transfer
Declaration that no repayment is expected or required
Source of funds and relationship of donor to receiver
whenToUse: Use this gift letter to certify to bank underwriters that down-payment cash provided by family is a gift and does not need to be repaid.

clauses.heading: FINANCIAL GIFT LETTER
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Financial Gift Letter. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Non-Repayment Gift Covenants
clauses.body: Donor certifies downpayment cash of {gift_amount} is a financial gift to receiver (relationship: {donor_relationship}). No repayment is expected.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
